words.definition: A company that owns aircraft and takes people or goods by plane from one place to another.
words.example: British Airways is one of the largest airlines in Europe.
The pilot announced that we would land in twenty minutes.

words.definition: The roads or paths that you use when you go from one place to another.
words.example: What is the best route to the airport?

words.definition: A plant grown for food, usually on a farm.
words.example: Wheat and corn are important food crops.

words.definition: A large amount of water that covers an area that was dry before.
words.example: The flood damaged hundreds of homes in the village.

words.definition: A particular place or part of a place.
words.example: The kitchen area is at the back of the house.

words.definition: An area of a town or country.
words.example: They live in the business district of the city.

words.definition: A solid piece of wood, stone, ice, etc. with straight sides.
words.example: The children built a tower with wooden blocks.

words.definition: Cloth, especially when it is used for making things such as clothes or curtains.
words.example: The dress is made from a soft cotton fabric.

words.definition: A substance that can flow, has no fixed shape and is not a solid or gas.
words.example: Make sure you drink plenty of liquids each day.

words.definition: A number of things put on top of each other.
words.example: There was a pile of books on the desk.

words.definition: Firm and hard; not a liquid or a gas.
words.example: Ice is the solid form of water.

words.definition: A variety of objects or things.
words.example: There was lots of stuff in the box.

words.definition: To pull something so that it separates into pieces or gets a hole in it.
words.example: Be careful not to tear the paper when you open the envelope.

words.definition: Someone that you do a particular activity with.
words.example: Work with a partner to complete the exercise.

words.definition: Greeted with pleasure when you arrive at a place.
words.example: We always make visitors feel welcome in our home.
